data.title: Welcome to PT Site
data.content:
Welcome to our private torrent tracker! We are glad to have you here.

Please read the rules carefully and start uploading/downloading.

data.title: Server Maintenance Notice
data.content:
Scheduled maintenance on Sunday 2024-01-14 from 02:00 to 06:00 UTC.

During this time, the site may be temporarily unavailable.

data.title: New Category Added: Audiobooks
data.content: We have added a new category for audiobooks. Feel free to upload your favorite audiobooks!

data.title: Free Leech Weekend
data.content:
Enjoy free leech this weekend! Download as much as you want without affecting your ratio.

Event starts Friday 18:00 UTC and ends Monday 06:00 UTC.

data.title: Upload Contest Results
data.content:
Congratulations to the top uploaders of December 2023!

  • 1st Place: admin (150 torrents)
  • 2nd Place: user2 (89 torrents)
  • 3rd Place: user3 (67 torrents)

Prizes will be credited to your accounts.
